case_title: ALEXANDER LOUISE et al VS LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $708.00 FILED BY ALEXANDER LOUISE CURRIE KENNETH BRYDEN GAIL AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER LOUISE CURRIE KENNETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RECEIPT ON CERTIFIED LETTER RETURNED. SIGNATURE NOT LEGIBLE.
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO GAIL BRYDEN RETURNED, NO SUCH POST OFFICE IN STATE NAMED.
